# Aafaque Nazir — Web Developer & AI Engineer

> Freelance web developer and AI engineer based in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.
> Website: https://aafaque.in
> Email: aafaquenazir@gmail.com
> WhatsApp: +91 93256 29256

## About

Aafaque Nazir is a freelance web developer and AI engineer based in Navi Mumbai, India. He specializes in building high-performance websites, AI-powered SaaS platforms, intelligent chatbots, and interactive 3D web experiences using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, and AI/ML technologies.

## Services & Pricing

- **High-Converting Websites** — Conversion-focused, SEO-optimized, premium animated websites with fast load times and mobile responsiveness. Starting from ₹8,999 (~$110 USD).
- **Custom Online Stores (E-Commerce)** — Custom ecommerce stores, product catalogs, payment gateway integrations (Razorpay/Stripe), inventory management, and order tracking systems. Starting from ₹24,999 (~$300 USD).
- **Custom Web Apps (SaaS)** — Scalable SaaS platforms, admin dashboards, and custom portals built to automate and manage your entire business. Custom pricing.

## Technical Skills

React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Node.js, AI/ML, OpenAI API, LangChain, ChatGPT Integration, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Framer Motion, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Firebase, MongoDB, Three.js, WebGL, Git, Vercel, SEO Optimization.

## Location & Availability

- Based in: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- Serves: Navi Mumbai, Mumbai, Pune, Thane, all of India, and worldwide remote clients
- Available: Monday–Saturday, 9 AM – 9 PM IST
- Languages: English, Hindi, Urdu
